name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan significantly reorganizes the workflow. Step 1 of the new plan combines GARCH filtering, factor extraction, and covariance estimation (which were split across steps 1 and 2 in the old plan). Step 2 of the new plan focuses on portfolio optimization and new performance metrics (turnover, Information Ratio, Explained Variance Ratio) that were not part of the original plan. Because the intermediate data structure and the specific tasks within each step have been fundamentally restructured, it is safer to restart from step 1 to ensure consistency in the new workflow.
